How It Works

Simple Process. Powerful Results.

From artwork approval to your brand riding the streets — launched in under 48 hours.

01

Design Your Campaign

Share your brand assets or let our team craft high-impact wraps and LED content built for street-level visibility.

02

We Wrap the Fleet

Your branding professionally applied to our vetted delivery bike network within 48 hours of campaign approval.

03

Bikes Hit the Street

Branded riders move through the city's busiest corridors — your ad seen in traffic, estates, markets, everywhere daily.

04

Track Every Impression

GPS route data, photo proofs, and real-time impression reports — transparent proof of performance every week.

Our Offerings

Three Ways Your Brand Moves.

From vinyl wraps to programmatic LED screens — the medium that fits your strategy.

Vinyl Wrap

Bike Branding & Wraps

Full vinyl wraps applied to motorcycle delivery boxes and fairings. Your brand in constant motion — every route, every day, thousands of street-level impressions.

Enquire Now
LED Screen

LED Digital Screen Ads

Weatherproof 3-sided LED panels mounted on motorcycle delivery boxes — programmed by location and time of day. A true moving digital billboard in urban traffic.

Enquire Now
Flyer Drop

Flyer & Sampling Drops

Riders hand-deliver branded flyers, promo cards, or product samples directly at point of delivery — guaranteed kitchen table reach for every campaign.

Enquire Now

Got Questions?

We've Got Answers.

Everything you need to know about running a campaign or joining our rider network.

How can I be sure my brand is safe from bad driving?
+
All rider partners are vetted through a strict verification process. We run a driver incentive programme rewarding safe driving, plus live GPS tracking and regular video check-ins. Replacement branding is provided at no cost in the event of any accident.
What are the dimensions of the delivery boxes?
+
Standard branded delivery boxes measure approximately 45cm (W) × 40cm (H) × 40cm (D). LED screen boxes measure 500mm × 500mm × 530mm with 3-sided 15"×15" displays at 4500nit brightness. We provide exact specs and a digital mock-up before production.
Do you design artwork or must we supply it?
+
Both options available. Supply your own print-ready artwork, or our in-house team creates street-ready branding for you. Share your brand guidelines and goals — we handle design, mock-ups, and approval before going live.
How do I know the drivers are actually on the road?
+
Every bike is GPS tracked in real-time. Weekly reports show route maps, kilometres covered, hours active, and zone coverage. Regular photo check-ins from riders provide visual proof of display at all times.
Where is this available?
+
We are live and expanding across major African cities. Reach out through our enquiry form and we'll confirm coverage in your target area. New cities are added regularly as our rider network grows.
How long to get bikes on the road?
+
Once artwork is approved, branded bikes are on the road within 48 hours. LED screen campaigns allow 3–5 working days for hardware setup and content loading.
What happens if the box gets damaged?
+
Campaign uptime is fully guaranteed. Damage to any branded box is covered — we re-wrap or replace at no additional charge. LED screen hardware is covered under our operational insurance.
